Results for 'top attractions, temples, nature spots' in Srisailam, Andhra Pradesh, India:
1. Shri Mallikarjuna Jyotirlinga Temple [Hindu temple] ⭐ 4.7 (59000 reviews)
   📍 Srisailam, Andhra Pradesh, India
   "The temple has amazing views, great architecture, and a calm atmosphere."
2. Siddi Ramappa Kolanu [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.5 (229 reviews)
   📍 3VGC+C9
   "Very peaceful place and very beautiful location near the temple"
3. Srisailam best waterfalls [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.4 (202 reviews)
   📍 3VGC+F9F
   "Best waterfall very near to the temple."
4. Srisailam Dam View Point [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.6 (11000 reviews)
   📍 3VPX+7R9
   "An unforgettable mix of engineering, nature, and spirituality."
5. Paladhara-Panchadhara [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.4 (8100 reviews)
   📍 3V3R+7CR, Road
   "Nice temple with a waterfall and a nice view."
